gate0.source_grade_rationale: PR Newswire is a primary press-release wire; this release originates directly from Honeywell International, making it a company-issued board-resolution disclosure distributed over a Grade-A wire.

materiality_math: Base 75 (major capital-structure change, direct primary issuer, material relevance 0.98) + novelty 13 (0.85 × 15) − penalties 0 (new_event, no prior match) + override 5 (Grade-A official company press release, board-approved resolution) = 93/100
routing_reason: Board-approved spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace into a separately listed company is a first-seen, major structural event with no ledger precedent. Materiality 93 clears the 70-point threshold.

sources.claim_supported: Board approval of Honeywell Aerospace spin-off; HONA ticker; 1-for-2 share distribution; June 29 distribution date; June 15 record date; 1-for-2 reverse stock split of remaining entity; rebranding to Honeywell Technologies (HON); CEO Vimal Kapur attribution.
